/* 17 February */ ce, per source (" the International Court of Justice declined to issue new constraints aimed at preventing such an incursion.  Instead, the international court said the “perilous situation” in Gaza, including in Rafah, required Israel to abide by a previous ruling issued last month, which included Israel taking “all measures within its power” to prevent the crime of genocide by its forces.")
